kendra.datasource.documentsmetadataconfi: Document metadata files that contain information such as the document access control information, source URI, document author, and custom attributes. Each metadata file contains metadata about a single document.

kendra.datasource.documentsmetadataconfi.Description: A prefix used to filter metadata configuration files in the AWS S3 bucket. The S3 bucket might contain multiple metadata files. Use `S3Prefix` to include only the desired metadata files.
